features: Axe Ice Chill Spray deodorant smells like frozen mint and lime.
Body spray cools the skin and is suitable for the entire upper body.
Body spray for men who can instantly cool the skin by 6 degrees.
description: Product description AXE Ice Cool Men's Deodorant Body Spray 48H Fresh 150ml 150ml Antiperspirant Spray Smells like Ice Mint and Lime. Body spray cools the skin and is suitable for the entire upper body. Body spray for men who can instantly cool the skin by 6 degrees. Directions Clean and dry the underarm area before application. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the armpit area. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Reapply as needed throughout the day or after physical activity for continued protection.
